properties.text:
The Node Label node reads the title of the node connected to its input (depth=1 means direct parent).

Here it reads the title of the CheckpointLoaderSimple and emits it as a STRING. The model value is passed through unchanged on the node output. Increase depth to travel further upstream — useful when you rename loader nodes to reflect the model they carry.
